title: Help needed to locate missing Candice Sass
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna police are...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna police are appealing to the public for any information that could assist in locating Candice Sass (42), a resident of Kalender Street in Hornlee, who has been reported missing.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna police are appealing to the public for any information that could assist in locating Candice Sass (42), a resident of Kalender Street in Hornlee, who has been reported missing."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to preliminary reports, Sass was last seen leaving her home on the morning of Monday 11 August, and has not returned since."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the time of her disappearance, she was wearing black tracksuit pants and takkies.","html":"At the time of her disappearance, she was wearing black tracksuit pants and takkies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone with information on Sass' whereabouts is asked to contact the investigation officer, Warrant Officer James Visagie, at the Knysna Detectives, on 044 302 6652 or 073 244 6154. Alternatively, information could be shared via Crime Stop on 08600 10111 or the MySAPS app.","html":"Anyone with information on Sass' whereabouts is asked to contact the investigation officer, Warrant Officer James Visagie, at the Knysna Detectives, on 044 302 6652 or 073 244 6154. Alternatively, information could be shared via Crime Stop on 08600 10111 or the MySAPS app."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Help needed to locate missing Candice Sass
